raw_result.description: Cloud platform for deploying web applications with a documented developer REST API for managing projects, deployments, domains, teams, and related resources.
raw_result.auth_notes: The REST API docs describe authentication with a Bearer token in the Authorization header for personal accounts and team access.
raw_result.gating_reason: Vercel publishes self-serve pricing with a Hobby plan and public REST API documentation; no evidence gathered shows API access itself is partner-gated or admin-approved.

api_surface.breadth: Public REST API documented at /docs/rest-api covering core platform resources such as projects, deployments, domains, and teams.
api_surface.mcp_notes: Vercel documents an MCP page, indicating an official MCP offering exists, but the exact packaging/details were not fully captured from the page text in the gathered evidence.

raw_result.rate_limit_notes: Vercel documents REST API rate limits on its Limits documentation, structured by duration and scope, with plan-specific examples noted there.
raw_result.notable_signals: Official docs include a dedicated REST API overview, limits documentation, public pricing, and an MCP documentation page.
raw_result.human_review_reason: The gathered browser evidence confirms an MCP page exists, but did not capture enough structured page text to fully support the MCP detail notes with high confidence; token auth and self-serve access are supported, but MCP specifics remain thin.
